title: Briful 3-Pack 10" Glitter Magnolia Artificial Flower Stem Large Green Magnolia Flowers for Christmas Tree Decorations Artificial Christmas Flowers Arrangements for Xmas Decorations
features: 【Premium Magnolia Artificial Flowers】The artificial magnolia flower in green protrudes from the Christmas decorations as a stem flower with large blossom. The magnolia is modeled realistically with great attention to detail and feels nice and velvety when touched. Each petal in different size, and a cluster of glitering gold stamen set on the top. Green artificial flowers with long stem which can be bent, pinned or shortened.

【Christmas Decorations Indoor】Large magnolia christmas decorations will be an eye-catcher in winter. Depending on the ambience, the classic magnolia flowers artificial look playful, modern or traditional. Let your creativity run wild and bring Christmas shine into your room with our large faux magnolia flowers.

【Fake Magnolia Flower Size】Our artificial magnolia as a long stem flower with a total of 3 stunning faux flowers. The glittering and velvety magnolia flowers, sit on a high-quality brown bendable stem and is about 18-inch long. The beautiful large flower head is about 10-inch in diameter.

【Eye-catching Magnolia Floral Arrangements】The decorative fake flowers adorn the table, the windowsill or the chest of drawers very well, for example, by putting the magnolia stem in a tall vase and filling it with artificial greenery. Whether at home, at an event or as decoration in business premises, or at the reception of a company.

【Sparkling Large Christmas Flowers】Create a Christmas bouquet in bright colours with the magnolia faux flowers. The artificial flowers are practically indestructible and are therefore ideal as shop window decorations or as flower decorations for a restaurant. But even at home you can create an impressive arrangement or Xmas tree decorations with the artificial magnolia stem.
